name: Beethika Saini Thakur
text: It boosted my confidence for interviews, and the learnings played a big role in helping me land my dream job at my dream company.

name: Sneha Sanam
outcome: Restarted her career after a break — now at AWS.
text: When I joined, I had almost no knowledge of cloud computing. I didn't even understand what 'cloud' meant at the beginning. The hackathons and real-world projects gave me strong hands-on experience and boosted my confidence.

name: Priyanka Pardeshi
text: A strong blend of theory and hands-on practice — Linux, Git, Docker, Jenkins, Kubernetes, Terraform, AWS. It boosted my confidence with cloud and automation.

name: Debabrata Puhan
text: You are honestly the best teacher I have come across. Your teaching style is smart, practical, and genuinely career-focused — especially for DevOps and AI.

name: Mahesh Bagul
text: It was a great experience learning with Shubham.

name: Vaibhav Mane
text: From the basics of Linux to CI/CD with GitHub Actions and containers with Docker and Kubernetes — your practical teaching makes complex DevOps tools accessible.

name: Muhammad Usman Arif
outcome: Landed his first job after the cohort.
text: I got my first job after taking the course with Shubham — it's been really helpful for learning new skills.

name: Tanu Anuria
text: The experience is great — you explain the topic very well and also show practically how things actually work in production.

name: Yash Shaw
text: It wasn't just a course but a complete package which holds power to transform one's entire life. I highly recommend the live batch to anyone trying to break into DevOps.
